# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User prefers clean coding principles: single responsibility, early returns, no if/else or switch statements where possible, and functions kept under 10 lines where possible.
- Conduct ongoing clean-code audits to keep file size down, ideally under 400 lines, while preserving behavior.
- Provide explanations of changes made, especially for complex software engineering concepts, to aid in learning software engineering.
- Ensure the how-to-play modal appears while players are loading into the game, not in the lobby before the game starts.
